violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth was found stored on the side of buckets with sanitizing solution. Wet wiping cloths should be stored in the sanitizing solution or laundered.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave and the cover for the portable fan were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
